SecurityGroupEgress.Description: Allow all outbound traffic by default

Properties.Description: GET /neighborhoods — all or single neighborhood stats
Weekly ETL placeholder — run etl.py locally for v1

Properties.BuildSpec:
version: "1.0"
frontend:
  phases:
    preBuild:
      commands:
        - npm ci
    build:
      commands:
        - npm run build
  artifacts:
    baseDirectory: dist
    files:
      - "**/*"
  cache:
    paths:
      - node_modules/**/*
